chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 559 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08.11.2024 Chaudhry Shahid Hussain Rajput, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Aftab Hussain Bhutto, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents/proposed accused, which is taken on record. Statement has also been filed by SIP Hazar Khan on behalf of SHO Police Station, Ubauor. Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length submits that the applicant will approach the concerned Court by way of filing direct complaint of the incident, hence he does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Order accordingly. It is made clear that if direct complaint is filed by the applicant before the Court having jurisdiction, however, the concerned Court shall not be influenced by the impugned order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Judge ARBROHI
